title: Wholesome Canadian Kale Wrap
description: A fluffy, brine-wet wrap packed with anti-inflammatory kale, roasted sweet potatoes, and creamy avocado, perfect for a lazy Sunday lunch.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C and spread diced sweet potatoes on a baking sheet, drizzle with 1 tablespoon olive oil, salt, pepper, then roast for 20 minutes until tender.
While the sweet potatoes roast, rinse the kale, remove stems, and chop into bite-sized pieces.
Sauté the kale quickly with a splash of water for 2 minutes, then season with a pinch of salt and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Warm the tortillas in a dry skillet for 30 seconds on each side or microwave for 20 seconds to make them pliable.
Spread mashed avocado onto each tortilla, add a layer of roasted sweet potatoes, sautéed kale, and cherry tomato halves.
Fold the sides over and roll tightly, then cut in half and serve warm.
